snippet.title: Take A Look At SylviaвҖҷs Modern Peranakan Home | Singapore Shophouse Tour
snippet.description:
FINALLY, SYLVIA'S HOME TOUR THAT EVERYONE HAS BEEN WAITING FOR!! It's really interesting to see how she include elements of her childhood into this dream Peranakan home of her's!

ALL PROMO CODES HERE: http://bit.ly/sylrenodeals
Take a 3D Tour: http://bit.ly/syl3dtour
Reno Journey: http://bit.ly/sylhouserenobts1
Read more about this shophouse here: http://bit.ly/sylhomendecor

Rezt N Relax is giving a FREE kitchen Makeover Promotion (Worth$10k, up to 20ft), all you need to do is follow them on Instagram @reztrelax and comment on https://bit.ly/freekitchenmakeover  "ILOVENOC" (additional chances if you sign a renovation contract with them , with 1 chance every $1000 spent) and a winner will be picked on 30th June!
*T&C Applies

VEHS.COM  will be organising Singapore First Hybrid Home Reno Expo from 24th - 9th May!
Those who pre-register for the physical event and gets accepted - will get a $50 audio house voucher on top of goodie bags & spin-the-wheel! Simply sign up using this code: RYANISHANDSOME at their website!

Additionally, if u sign up a renovation contract with R&R via VEHS.com from 24th - 9th May, u get to stand a chance to win a Mercedes Benz A200 Saloon, 1 chance for every $100 spent, contest ends 31st Dec 2021!В 

For more information, please head to the website at www.vehs.com

https://thecommunelife.com/В 
вҖңNOCxCommune10вҖқ for 10% off

вҖңSylviaSmartHomeвҖқ $150 off smart home package

lock worth $149 (inclusive of installation)

Quote вҖңNOCWELLSвҖқ when you purchase "Wells The One" and will receive two free showerheads

вҖңNOC10вҖқ for 10% off min. purchase of $50.

snippet.title: з–«жғ…еӨұжҺ§!еҚ°еәҰеңӢе…§ж°‘жҖЁзҮ’гҖҖеҚ°еәҰзҘһз«Ҙй җиЁҖ9жңҲз–«жғ…й«ҳеі°| еҚҒй»һдёҚдёҖжЁЈ 20210501
snippet.description:
#еҚ°еәҰз–«жғ… #1129и¶іи·Ў #зӨҫдәӨи·қйӣўAPP
еҚ°еәҰе–®ж—ҘзўәиЁәз ҙ40иҗ¬дҫӢеҶҚеүөж–°зҙҖйҢ„пјҢйҖЈзҒ«еҢ–йғҪеҫ—е…Ҳй ҳиҷҹзўјзүҢпјҢеҚ°еәҰеңӢе…§жҖ’зҒ«е»¶зҮ’пјҢзёҪйҮҢиҺ«иҝӘиҲҮзҫҺеңӢйғҪйҒӯж®ғпјӣж–°еҶ з–«жғ…дҪ•жҷӮиғҪжңүзӣЎй ӯ?еҚ°еәҰзҘһз«Ҙд№ҹжңүжңҖж–°й җиЁҖжӣқе…үпјӣеңӢе…§жЎҲ1129и¶іи·Ўи·ЁеҮәеҢ—йғЁпјҢең°й»һйҒҚеҸҠеҳүзҫ©йҳҝйҮҢеұұйҒҠжЁӮең’еҚҖе’ҢеҘ®иө·ж№–е•ҶеңҲйҖ—з•ҷд»ҘеҸҠеҢ—жёҜд»ЈеӨ©е®®е’ҢжңқеӨ©е®®пјҢзӣёй—ңж—…йҒҠжҷҜй»һд№ҹеҠ з·Ҡж¶ҲжҜ’пјӣи©ізҙ°е…§е®№и«ӢйҺ–е®ҡTVBSж–°иҒһеҸ°гҖӮ

в—ҸиЁӮй–ұгҖҗTVBSйҒёж–°иҒһгҖ‘жӮЁеңЁд№Һзҡ„дәӢ TVBSе№«жӮЁйҒёрҹ‘үhttps://pse.is/3c4lrn
в—ҸиЁӮй–ұгҖҗTVBSNEWSгҖ‘жңҖж–°иіҮиЁҠйҰ¬дёҠжҺҘж”¶рҹ‘үhttps://tvbsnews.pse.is/3ayanv
в—ҸдёӢијүгҖҗTVBSж–°иҒһAPPгҖ‘жңҖеҚіжҷӮпјҒ  з«ӢеҚідёӢијүрҹ‘үhttps://tvbsnews.pse.is/SHMU9
в—ҸжҢүи®ҡгҖҗTVBSж–°иҒһFBгҖ‘её¶жӮЁжҺҢжҸЎеҚіжҷӮж–°иіҮиЁҠрҹ‘үhttps://tvbsnews.pse.is/RJ5ZV
в—ҸиҝҪи№ӨгҖҗTVBSж–°иҒһIGгҖ‘иҲҮжӮЁиЁҺи«–гҖҢжӮЁи©ІеңЁд№Һзҡ„дәӢгҖҚрҹ‘үhttps://tvbsnews.pse.is/RP984
в—ҸгҖҗTVBSж–°иҒһз¶ІгҖ‘рҹ‘үhttps://tvbsnews.pse.is/SH72D

snippet.title: еҚ°еәҰз–«жғ…жҙ»иәҚеҖӢжЎҲе°ҮйЈҶиҮі48иҗ¬  йҮҚеүөйҡҺзҙҡ!еҚ°еәҰжңүйҢўиІ·дёҚеҲ°йҶ«зҷӮ | еҚҒй»һдёҚдёҖжЁЈ 20210427
snippet.description:
#еҚ°еәҰ #з–«жғ… #и®ҠзЁ®з—…жҜ’
ж №ж“ҡеҚ°еәҰзҗҶе·ҘеӯёйҷўпјҲIITпјүз§‘еӯёе®¶иЁӯиЁҲзҡ„ж•ёеӯёжЁЎеһӢпјҢеҚ°еәҰз¬¬дәҢжіўз–«жғ…пјҲз·ЁжҢүпјҡз§‘еӯёе®¶жҢҮзҡ„жҳҜжҙ»иәҚеҖӢжЎҲпјҢеҚіжҳҜгҖҢжӯЈжӮЈз—…зҡ„дәәгҖҚпјүеҸҜиғҪеңЁ5жңҲ14ж—ҘиҮі18ж—Ҙжңҹй–“еҲ°й ӮпјҢеҖӢжЎҲе®—ж•ёзӮә380,000иҮі480,000пјӣеҚ°еәҰжӯҰжјўиӮәзӮҺз–«жғ…еӨ§зҲҶзҷјпјҢж–°еўһзўәиЁәеұўеүөж–°й«ҳгҖӮиЁұеӨҡеҹҺеёӮе·Із„Ўз—…еәҠж”¶жІ»жӮЈиҖ…пјҢж°‘зңҫиў«иҝ«жғіиҫҰжі•еңЁе®¶дёӯжІ»зҷӮгҖӮдҪҶй»‘еёӮи—Ҙе“ҒгҖҒж°§ж°Јз“¶е’ҢиЈҪж°§ж©ҹеғ№ж јйЈҶжјІгҖҒеҒҮи—Ҙе……ж–ҘпјҢиЁұеӨҡдәәеӣ жІ»зҷӮдёҚеҸҠжӯ»еҺ»гҖӮи©ізҙ°е…§е®№и«ӢйҺ–е®ҡTVBSж–°иҒһеҸ°гҖӮ

в—ҸиЁӮй–ұгҖҗTVBSйҒёж–°иҒһгҖ‘жӮЁеңЁд№Һзҡ„дәӢ TVBSе№«жӮЁйҒёрҹ‘үhttps://pse.is/3c4lrn
в—ҸиЁӮй–ұгҖҗTVBSNEWSгҖ‘жңҖж–°иіҮиЁҠйҰ¬дёҠжҺҘж”¶рҹ‘үhttps://tvbsnews.pse.is/3ayanv
в—ҸдёӢијүгҖҗTVBSж–°иҒһAPPгҖ‘жңҖеҚіжҷӮпјҒ  з«ӢеҚідёӢијүрҹ‘үhttps://tvbsnews.pse.is/SHMU9
в—ҸжҢүи®ҡгҖҗTVBSж–°иҒһFBгҖ‘её¶жӮЁжҺҢжҸЎеҚіжҷӮж–°иіҮиЁҠрҹ‘үhttps://tvbsnews.pse.is/RJ5ZV
в—ҸиҝҪи№ӨгҖҗTVBSж–°иҒһIGгҖ‘иҲҮжӮЁиЁҺи«–гҖҢжӮЁи©ІеңЁд№Һзҡ„дәӢгҖҚрҹ‘үhttps://tvbsnews.pse.is/RP984
в—ҸгҖҗTVBSж–°иҒһз¶ІгҖ‘рҹ‘үhttps://tvbsnews.pse.is/SH72D

snippet.title: The Hindu priest struggling to cremate IndiaвҖҷs Covid dead
snippet.description:
RamKaran Mishra is a Hindu priest who performs the last rites at the Ghazipur crematorium in east Delhi, on the frontline of India's Covid crisis. He's been cremating up to 150 bodies day after day, working long hours into the night. With no end in sight, and feeling abandoned by his government, Mishra must deal with traumatised families and an ever-present smell of burning bodies

snippet.title: India overwhelmed by worldвҖҷs worst Covid crisis - BBC News
snippet.description:
International help is being pledged for India as it battles a ferocious second wave of coronavirus, described by Prime Minister Narendra Modi as a storm that has shaken the nation.

Almost 350,000 new infections were recorded in India in the latest 24 hour period - a record number for the fourth day in a row. 

As the epidemic continues to grow hospitals are under intolerable pressure - with shortages of beds and critical supplies including oxygen. 

Mishal Husain presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Yogita Limaye in Delhi and diplomatic correspondent Paul Adams. 

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: India: No hospital beds - families take their dying to temples
snippet.description:
People are dying waiting for oxygen, waiting for ambulances, waiting for hospital beds.

(Subscribe: https://bit.ly/C4_News_Subscribe)

From the official figures alone, this has been India's deadliest day yet of the pandemic and the real problem could be many times worse.

And if vaccination is the best way to protect the population, there simply aren't nearly enough doses to go around.

We hear from our reporter Mandikini Gahlot, who's in New Delhi, and be warned: there are some distressing scenes in the report.

Camera operator: Suyash Shrivastava.

-------

Watch more of our explainer series here - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXjqQf1xYLQ6bu-iixvoFTVsiXQVlVniX

snippet.title: What It's Like To Work At A Crematorium In India As The Death Toll Mounts
snippet.description:
India had 360,960 new COVID-19 cases in one day this week, marking the world's largest single-day total. The country has nearly 18 million infections and more than 200,000 people have already died. One man is doing what he can to honor those whose lives have been cut short by the virus.

snippet.title: Singapore, Malaysia to allow cross-border travel on compassionate grounds from May 17 [FULL]
snippet.description:
Travel on compassionate grounds between Singapore and Malaysia will be allowed from May 17, amid Covid-19 restrictions that ban the bulk of cross-border movement.

Foreign Minister Vivian Balakrishnan made the announcement on Sunday (May 2) together with his Malaysian counterpart, Datuk Seri Hishammuddin Hussein, who was on a two-day official visit to Singapore till Sunday.

The details of such travel arrangements will be released later, but these will include steps like testing visitors for the coronavirus as well as the need for quarantine, said Dr Balakrishnan.

The two leaders also discussed a potential air travel bubble between Singapore and Malaysia, and Mr Hishammuddin said that in order to proceed, further negotiations with the transport ministries of both countries will be required.

They also talked about mutually recognising vaccine certificates to facilitate cross-border travel in the future, which will be done digitally, noted Mr Hishammuddin. He added that for such travel to happen, the digital contact tracing tools of both countries would need to be compatible with each other.

This is Mr Hishammuddin's first official visit to Singapore in his capacity as Foreign Minister, said Malaysia's Ministry of Foreign Affairs.

Read the full story: 
https://www.straitstimes.com/singapore/spore-and-malaysia-to-allow-cross-border-travel-on-compassionate-grounds-from-may-17

snippet.title: JJ Lin жһ—дҝҠеӮ‘ ft. Anne-Marie гҖҠBedroomгҖӢOfficial Lyric Video
snippet.description:
JJ Lin жһ—дҝҠеӮ‘ ft. @Anne-Marie гҖҠBedroomгҖӢ
рҹҺ§  https://jjlin.lnk.to/BedroomftAnneMarieAY

Ohh, why you look so sad?
IвҖҷve never seen you look so bad 
You used to be the strongest of us two
Now look at you, sitting there 

YouвҖҷre crying in your bedroom
Cos IвҖҷve gone and left you 
Wish I never met you 
DonвҖҷt know what youвҖҷve got until itвҖҷs gone 
-
A stripped-down piano ballad that shines the spotlight on the distinct, emotive vocals of JJ and the powerhouse vocals of Anne-Marie, this poignant song conveys the different perspectives  and emotional struggles in a relationship.

Imageries of oneвҖҷs struggles when youвҖҷre all alone within the safe space of your own bedroom come to mind when one listens to this track of love and loss. What was the downfall of this relationship? Was it you, or me? How did we arrive at this point? 

Reflections, regrets, indignance, vulnerability and eventually, letting go - Bedroom takes you through the bittersweet emotional journey of lost love.

жңҖжҘөиҮҙзҡ„еңЁж„ҸпјҢе°ұжҳҜжӢје‘Ҫе‘ҠиЁҙиҮӘе·ұпјҢжҲ‘дёҚеңЁж„Ҹ
жҲ‘зҚЁеқҗеңЁжҲҝй–“иЈЎпјҢз”ЁеҠӣж…¶зҘқйҖҷе ҙеӨұеҺ»
дҪ зҚЁеқҗеңЁжҲҝй–“иЈЎпјҢиј•ж’«и‘—еҫҢжӮ”зҡ„ж·ҡж°ҙ

жҳҸжҡ—зҡ„жҲҝй–“дёӯйҖҸеҮәеӯӨйӣ¶йӣ¶зҡ„иә«еҪұпјҢдёҚеӨҡеҠ дҝ®йЈҫпјҢAnne-Marie зҚЁзү№зҡ„е—“йҹіе„Әйӣ…ең°жҗӯд№ҳи‘—йӢјзҗҙзҷ»е ҙпјҢе®ӣеҰӮе№ійқңж№–йқўдёҠиҲҲиө·зҡ„жјЈжјӘиҲ¬д»Өдәәж·ұйҷ·е…¶йӯ…еҠӣдёӯпјҢй–“еҘҸJJзҡ„е’ҢиҒІи®“е…©дәәзҡ„иҒІз·ҡзәҸз№һи‘—пјҢеӢҫеҮәзөІзөІз¶ҝе»¶зҡ„жғ…ж„ҹпјҢиҖҢеҫҢж®өJJжё…жҫҲй«ҳдәўзҡ„е—“йҹіпјҢеҫһд№ҫж·Ёзҡ„йӢјзҗҙдјҙеҘҸдёӯз©ҝйҖҸиҖҢеҮәпјҢзӮәжҳҸжҡ—зҡ„жҲҝй–“й»һдёҠиј•жҹ”й–ғиҖҖзҡ„зҮӯе…үпјҢзӮәжӯҢжӣІеўһеҠ дёҖиӮЎе …е®ҡзҡ„дёҰйҖҸеҮәйҡұйҡұзҡ„еӮ·ж„ҹгҖӮ

JJ Linз№јSteve AokiеҫҢпјҢеҶҚеәҰи·Ёи¶ҠеңӢз•ҢпјҢиҲҮиӢұеңӢзҡ„и¶…еј·еҜҰеҠӣеҘіжӯҢжүӢAnne-MarieеҗҲдҪңпјҢJJжё…дә®дё”е……ж»ҝжёІжҹ“еҠӣиҒІз·ҡжҗӯй…ҚAnne-MarieжёҫеҺҡдё”е……ж»ҝйӯ…еҠӣзҡ„е—“йҹіпјҢиұҗеҜҢйҖҷйҰ–вҖқBedroomвҖқзҡ„еұӨж¬ЎпјҢе…©дәәи©®йҮӢзӣёеҗҢзҡ„жӯҢжӣІж®өиҗҪгҖҒзӣёеҗҢзҡ„жӯҢи©һпјҢеҚ»жј”з№№еҮәжҲӘз„¶дёҚеҗҢзҡ„жғ…з·’гҖӮе®ӣеҰӮдёҚеҗҢжҷӮз©әйқўе°ҚеҗҢдёҖж®өйӣўеҲҘпјҢжңүеҘідәәзҡ„иҒІеҳ¶еҠӣз«ӯпјҢд№ҹжңүз”·дәәзҡ„еӯӨеӮІйҖһеј·пјҢдёҖй«”е…©йқўзҡ„жғ…ж„ҹеұ•зҸҫпјҢйғҪжҳҜжӯ·з¶“еӮ·з—ӣзҡ„жғ…зҜҖгҖӮж•ҙйҰ–жӯҢжӣІзҡ„и©®йҮӢпјҢдёҚеғ…жҳҜе…©дҪҚжӯҢжүӢзҡ„еҜҰеҠӣйЈҶжӯҢпјҢжӣҙй«”зҸҫдәҶеҸҰдёҖзЁ®жҷӮз©әе°Қи©ұзҡ„з”·еҘіеҗҲе”ұгҖӮ

localized.title: JJ Lin жһ—дҝҠеӮ‘ ft. Anne-Marie гҖҠBedroomгҖӢOfficial Lyric Video
localized.description:
JJ Lin жһ—дҝҠеӮ‘ ft. @Anne-Marie гҖҠBedroomгҖӢ
рҹҺ§  https://jjlin.lnk.to/BedroomftAnneMarieAY

Ohh, why you look so sad?
IвҖҷve never seen you look so bad 
You used to be the strongest of us two
Now look at you, sitting there 

YouвҖҷre crying in your bedroom
Cos IвҖҷve gone and left you 
Wish I never met you 
DonвҖҷt know what youвҖҷve got until itвҖҷs gone 
-
A stripped-down piano ballad that shines the spotlight on the distinct, emotive vocals of JJ and the powerhouse vocals of Anne-Marie, this poignant song conveys the different perspectives  and emotional struggles in a relationship.

Imageries of oneвҖҷs struggles when youвҖҷre all alone within the safe space of your own bedroom come to mind when one listens to this track of love and loss. What was the downfall of this relationship? Was it you, or me? How did we arrive at this point? 

Reflections, regrets, indignance, vulnerability and eventually, letting go - Bedroom takes you through the bittersweet emotional journey of lost love.

жңҖжҘөиҮҙзҡ„еңЁж„ҸпјҢе°ұжҳҜжӢје‘Ҫе‘ҠиЁҙиҮӘе·ұпјҢжҲ‘дёҚеңЁж„Ҹ
жҲ‘зҚЁеқҗеңЁжҲҝй–“иЈЎпјҢз”ЁеҠӣж…¶зҘқйҖҷе ҙеӨұеҺ»
дҪ зҚЁеқҗеңЁжҲҝй–“иЈЎпјҢиј•ж’«и‘—еҫҢжӮ”зҡ„ж·ҡж°ҙ
_
жҳҜдёҚи©ІеҶҚз•ҷжҲҖзҡ„иҰәжӮҹпјҢйӮ„жҳҜжҺ©йЈҫи‘—з—ӣеҫ№еҝғжүү

жҳҸжҡ—зҡ„жҲҝй–“дёӯйҖҸеҮәеӯӨйӣ¶йӣ¶зҡ„иә«еҪұпјҢдёҚеӨҡеҠ дҝ®йЈҫпјҢAnne-Marie зҚЁзү№зҡ„е—“йҹіе„Әйӣ…ең°жҗӯд№ҳи‘—йӢјзҗҙзҷ»е ҙпјҢе®ӣеҰӮе№ійқңж№–йқўдёҠиҲҲиө·зҡ„жјЈжјӘиҲ¬д»Өдәәж·ұйҷ·е…¶йӯ…еҠӣдёӯпјҢй–“еҘҸJJзҡ„е’ҢиҒІи®“е…©дәәзҡ„иҒІз·ҡзәҸз№һи‘—пјҢеӢҫеҮәзөІзөІз¶ҝе»¶зҡ„жғ…ж„ҹпјҢиҖҢеҫҢж®өJJжё…жҫҲй«ҳдәўзҡ„е—“йҹіпјҢеҫһд№ҫж·Ёзҡ„йӢјзҗҙдјҙеҘҸдёӯз©ҝйҖҸиҖҢеҮәпјҢзӮәжҳҸжҡ—зҡ„жҲҝй–“й»һдёҠиј•жҹ”й–ғиҖҖзҡ„зҮӯе…үпјҢзӮәжӯҢжӣІеўһеҠ дёҖиӮЎе …е®ҡзҡ„дёҰйҖҸеҮәйҡұйҡұзҡ„еӮ·ж„ҹгҖӮ

JJ Linз№јSteve AokiеҫҢпјҢеҶҚеәҰи·Ёи¶ҠеңӢз•ҢпјҢиҲҮиӢұеңӢзҡ„и¶…еј·еҜҰеҠӣеҘіжӯҢжүӢAnne-MarieеҗҲдҪңпјҢJJжё…дә®дё”е……ж»ҝжёІжҹ“еҠӣиҒІз·ҡжҗӯй…ҚAnne-MarieжёҫеҺҡдё”е……ж»ҝйӯ…еҠӣзҡ„е—“йҹіпјҢиұҗеҜҢйҖҷйҰ–вҖқBedroomвҖқзҡ„еұӨж¬ЎпјҢе…©дәәи©®йҮӢзӣёеҗҢзҡ„жӯҢжӣІж®өиҗҪгҖҒзӣёеҗҢзҡ„жӯҢи©һпјҢеҚ»жј”з№№еҮәжҲӘз„¶дёҚеҗҢзҡ„жғ…з·’гҖӮе®ӣеҰӮдёҚеҗҢжҷӮз©әйқўе°ҚеҗҢдёҖж®өйӣўеҲҘпјҢжңүеҘідәәзҡ„иҒІеҳ¶еҠӣз«ӯпјҢд№ҹжңүз”·дәәзҡ„еӯӨеӮІйҖһеј·пјҢдёҖй«”е…©йқўзҡ„жғ…ж„ҹеұ•зҸҫпјҢйғҪжҳҜжӯ·з¶“еӮ·з—ӣзҡ„жғ…зҜҖгҖӮж•ҙйҰ–жӯҢжӣІзҡ„и©®йҮӢпјҢдёҚеғ…жҳҜе…©дҪҚжӯҢжүӢзҡ„еҜҰеҠӣйЈҶжӯҢпјҢжӣҙй«”зҸҫдәҶеҸҰдёҖзЁ®жҷӮз©әе°Қи©ұзҡ„з”·еҘіеҗҲе”ұгҖӮ

#JJLin #AnneMarie #Bedroom
#JJLinLikeYouDo #JJXIV

I used to give a fuck вҖҳbout me and you
Now I look at you and I donвҖҷt care

snippet.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Manchester City: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Manchester City picked up a decisive 2-1 win in the first leg of the UEFA semi final against Paris Saint-Germain. 

PSG came out firing in the first half and converted one of their many chances into a goal. Marquinhos scored in the 15вҖҷ to give PSG the lead. PSG kept the pressure on in the first half and finished with 9 shots on goal. 

In the second half PSG was content to sit back and defend the one goal lead. Manchester City took advantage and notched two goals both from set pieces. 
De Bruyne scored in the 64' when he tried to play the ball to the far post off of a free kick and instead found the back of the bet. Then Mahrez put the English side ahead in the 71' when he found the hole in the PSG wall off of a free kick right outside the box. 

Manchester City was able to maintain that one goal lead and will head back home with a huge advantage on aggregate. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on Paramount+:
https://www.paramountplus.com/shows/uefa-champions-league/

#UCL #UEFA #ChampionsLeague #PSG #ManCity #ManchesterCity #ParisSaintGermain

snippet.title: еҚ°еәҰдёүеӨ©зҷҫиҗ¬дәәзўәиЁәз•¶иЎ—з„ҡеұҚ  йҷёзҫҺзҒ«жҳҹз«¶иіҪзҒ«жҳҹи»Ҡе‘ҪеҗҚ"зҘқиһҚиҷҹ" | еҚҒй»һдёҚдёҖжЁЈ 20210426
snippet.description:
#еҚ°еәҰ #ж–°еҶ з–«жғ… #зҘқиһҚиҷҹ
еҚ°еәҰж–°еһӢеҶ зӢҖз—…жҜ’иӮәзӮҺз–«жғ…еҡҙеі»пјҢе…ЁзҗғеӨҡеҖӢеңӢе®¶е…ҲеҫҢе°ұз•¶ең°йҶ«зҷӮзі»зөұеҙ©жҪ°е’ҢиіҮжәҗжҘөеәҰзҹӯзјәдјёеҮәжҸҙжүӢпјҢзӮәе…¶жҸҗдҫӣеҢ…жӢ¬е‘јеҗёж©ҹеңЁе…§зҡ„йҶ«зҷӮиЁӯеӮҷгҖӮеӨ§йҷёжҸӯжӣүдәҶдёӯеңӢйҰ–ијӣзҒ«жҳҹи»Ҡзҡ„еҗҚзЁұв”ҖгҖҢзҘқиһҚиҷҹгҖҚгҖӮйҰ–ијӣзҒ«жҳҹи»Ҡе‘ҪеҗҚзӮәзҘқиһҚпјҢеҜ“ж„Ҹй»һзҮғдёӯеңӢжҳҹйҡӣжҺўжё¬зҡ„зҒ«зЁ®пјҢжҢҮеј•дәәйЎһе°Қжө©зҖҡжҳҹз©әзҡ„жҺҘзәҢжҺўзҙўе’ҢиҮӘжҲ‘и¶…и¶ҠгҖӮи©ізҙ°е…§е®№и«ӢйҺ–е®ҡTVBSж–°иҒһеҸ°гҖӮ

в—ҸиЁӮй–ұгҖҗTVBSйҒёж–°иҒһгҖ‘жӮЁеңЁд№Һзҡ„дәӢ TVBSе№«жӮЁйҒёрҹ‘үhttps://pse.is/3c4lrn

snippet.title: Singaporean in London attacked, saved by livestreamer
snippet.description:
Singaporean student Raymond Hing, 21, is seen being assaulted in real-time in London. 

The attack was recorded by YouTuber вҖңSherwinвҖқ, who had been doing a livestream. SherwinвҖҷs video shows him rushing to the aid of Mr Hing, shouting repeatedly at the attacker to вҖңLeave him alone!вҖқ

The attacker makes a lunge for Mr HingвҖҷs bicycle, before running away.

snippet.title: Undergoing Hormone Therapy And Dating As A Transwoman In SG: Antasha | Ask ZULA | EP 8
snippet.description:
In this episode of Ask ZULA, Antasha shares her journey and experiences as a transwoman in Singapore from her childhood to her transition journey to her life now. 

Here are the timestamps of the topics covered during the episode:
0:00 - Intro
1:00 - Experiences growing up
3:11 - Exploring her sexuality
3:41 - Introduction to the trans community
5:41 - Starting Hormone Therapy
6:20 - National Service (NS) exemption process
8:49 - MotherвҖҷs support
9:39 - Hormone therapy experience
10:39 - Acceptance from society
13:40 - Misconceptions about being trans (Sex reassignment surgery, IC etc.)
16:55 - Workplace experiences
18:47 - Dating as a transwoman
21:17 - Gen Y speaks article response
22:35 - Advice and conclusion

About Ask ZULA:
Ask ZULA is a brand new segment on the channel where we ask people in our office to share their life experiences as well as their perspectives on the talk of the town. 

About ZULA: 
ZULA is a website catered to Singaporean female millennials. We cover lifestyle, perspective and inspirational stories of women in Singapore.

Sign up to be on Zula's dating episodes:
https://tinyurl.com/zuladatingform

snippet.title: On Camera, Doctors Attacked After Covid Patient Dies At Delhi Hospital
snippet.description:
Doctors at a Delhi hospital were attacked Tuesday morning by the attendants of a woman, 67, who died in the emergency ward after her admission to the ICU was delayed due to a lack of beds. An unspecified number of doctors were injured in the clash outside Apollo Hospital in the national capital, which took place between 8 and 10 am. The police arrived an hour later - around 11 am. (Disclaimer: Content in this video could be disturbing for viewers.)

snippet.title: рҹ”ҙ [Live in HD] ONE On TNT IV
snippet.description:
The biggest month in ONE history comes to an epic conclusion this Thursday, 29 April, as ONE on TNT IV airs LIVE right here on YouTube at 8:30 a.m. SGT (some regions excluded).
 
In the main event, reigning ONE Light Heavyweight World Champion Aung La N Sang defends his crown against middleweight king Reinier de Ridder in a seismic World Champion vs. World Champion rematch!
 
In the co-main event, American mixed martial arts legend Eddie Alvarez makes a quick turnaround to face South Korean dynamo Ok Rae Yoon in a pivotal lightweight fight!
 
They are joined on this stacked card by undefeated Senegalese wrestling sensation "Reug Reug," Filipino icon Eduard Folayang, Japanese grappling legend Shinya Aoki, Filipino-American phenom Jackie Buntan, American karate superstar Colbey Northcutt, and MORE!
 
Check out the full card below, and make sure you tune in LIVE!
 
MAIN CARD:
 
Light Heavyweight World Championship
Aung La N Sang vs. Reinier de Ridder
 
Lightweight Mixed Martial Arts
Eddie Alvarez vs. Ok Rae Yoon
 
Heavyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Oumar Kane vs. Kirill Grishenko
 
LEAD CARD:
 
Lightweight Mixed Martial Arts
Eduard Folayang vs. Shinya Aoki
 
Women's Strawweight Muay Thai
Jackie Buntan vs. Ekaterina Vandaryeva
 
Women's Catchweight Mixed Martial Arts (60.6kg)
Colbey Northcutt vs. Courtney Martin

snippet.title: Singapura Kerahkan MV Swift Rescue dalam Pencarian KRI Nanggala
snippet.description:
Upaya pencarian KRI Nanggala yang hilang terus dilakukan di utara Pulau Bali. Kapal penyelamat MV Swift Rescue milik Singapura langsung dikerahkan ke Selat Bali pada Rabu (21/4/2021) sore. Bagian terpenting dari kapal itu adalah kapal penyelamat submersible Deep Search and Rescue Six (DSAR 6).

#InsidenKRINanggala #KRINanggala402 #Singapura

====================================

snippet.title: How rich countries are making the pandemic last longer
snippet.description:
A program called Covax wants to distribute Covid-19 vaccines fairly. Is it working?

Subscribe to our channel! http://goo.gl/0bsAjO

Early in the Covid-19 pandemic, many of the worldвҖҷs richest countries poured money into the race for a vaccine. Billions of dollars, from programs like the USвҖҷs Operation Warp Speed, funded development that brought us multiple Covid-19 vaccines in record time. But it also determined where those vaccines would go. Before vaccine doses had even hit the market, places like the US and the UK had bought up nearly the entire supply.

This turns out to be an old story. In nearly every modern global health crisis, from smallpox to malaria to H1N1, rich countries have bought up vital medical supplies, making poor countries wait sometimes decades for life-saving support. ItвҖҷs effectively a system in which where you live determines whether you live or die of a preventable disease. Leaving a disease like Covid-19 to spread unchecked in some places also gives it a chance to mutate -- and variants of the virus are already raising alarms. So: how do we get vaccines to countries that canвҖҷt afford them?

One solution underway is called Covax. ItвҖҷs a program co-led by the World Health Organization; Gavi, The Vaccine Alliance; and the Coalition of Epidemic Preparedness Innovations (CEPI). Its goal is to get vaccines to lower- and middle-income countries at the same time as rich countries. So how is it supposed to do that? And will it be enough?

More from Vox.comвҖҷs Julia Belluz + Jen Kirby on Covax and vaccine nationalism:
https://www.vox.com/21448719/covid-19-vaccine-covax-who-gavi-cepi
https://www.vox.com/2021/2/24/22298981/ghana-vaccines-global-covax-initiative
https://www.vox.com/2021/1/29/22253908/rich-countries-hoarding-covid-19-vaccines

Duke Global Health Innovation Center data: https://launchandscalefaster.org/covid-19/vaccineprocurement

More on vaccine nationalism:
https://www.oxfam.org/en/press-releases/campaigners-warn-9-out-10-people-poor-countries-are-set-miss-out-covid-19-vaccine
https://www.npr.org/sections/goatsandsoda/2021/02/04/963741244/in-vaccine-race-middle-income-nations-are-at-a-disadvantage-just-ask-peru

More on the H1N1 pandemic:
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2864298/
https://www.cdc.gov/flu/pandemic-resources/2009-pandemic-timeline.html

Vox.com is a news website that helps you cut through the noise and understand what's really driving the events in the headlines. Check out http://www.vox.com.

Watch our full video catalog: http://goo.gl/IZONyE

snippet.title: I got admitted to the hospital - Part 1
snippet.description:
Makkale.. I was not feeling well and got admitted to the hospital. The whole hospital scene was really depressing. Vlogging from the hospital bed and staying positive helped me recover faster рҹҳӣ A positive attitude can recreate your reality. 

The times are tough, everyone is in some version of covid crises directly or indirectly. Just stick around and stay positive. #ThisTooShallPass #StayStrong #StaySafe

snippet.title: BREAKING NEWS - Ditemukan di Kedalaman 838 Meter, Badan KRI Nanggala 402 Terbelah Jadi 3 Bagian
snippet.description:
KOMPAS.TV - Kepala Staf Angkatan Laut (KSAL) Laksamana TNI Yudo Margono menyatakan kondisi kapal KRI Nanggala-402 terbelah menjadi tiga bagian.

Terdapat bagian yang terlepas dari badan utama kapal.

"Berikut ini terdapat bagian-bagian dari KRI Nanggala. Di sana KRI Nanggala terbelah jadi 3 bagian," ujar Yudo dalam konferensi pers, Minggu (25/4).

Yudo menjelaskan terdapat bagian belakang kapal tak berbadan tekan, selanjutnya kemudi horizontal dan vertikal.

Pantauan ini terlihat melalui alat ROV dari Singapura yang mendapat kontak visual dan memperlihatkan adanya serpihan badan kapal KRI Nanggala 402 di kedalaman 838 meter.

Sementara itu, Panglima TNI, Marsekal Hadi Cahyanto menyatakan seluruh awak yang berada dalam KRI Nanggala 402 telah gugur.

Hal ini disampaikan langsung pada saat konferensi pers TNI pada Minggu, 25 April 2021.

Pernyataan ini berdasarkan temuan serpihan dan adanya sinyal Kapal selam KRI Nanggala 402 yang terdeteksi terakhir berada di kedalaman 838 meter.

Sementara diberitakan Schmidt Ocean Institute yang dikutip Kompas.com, di kedalaman lebih dari 800 meter kondisi air tidak seperti yang dirasakan di kolam renang.

Tekanan hidrostatis air meningkat sebanyak 1 atm setiap kedalaman 10 meter.

Artinya, jika tekanan di udara adalah 1 atm, tekanan di kedalaman 850 meter adalah 85 atm.

Sementara manusia hanya bisa bertahan pada tekanan sekitar 3 hingga 4 atm.

Mulai dari kedalaman 200 meter, semua cahaya mulai hilang dan suhu turun drastis.

Pada kondisi ini, laut benar-benar hitam. Cahaya mungkin hanya berasal dari bakteri dan hewan yang menghasilkan cahaya.

Hal itu juga yang menjadi salah satu alasan kenapa awak kapal selam KRI Nanggala-402 tidak dapat begitu saja keluar dari kapal selam.

Berenang di laut pada kedalaman 850 adalah hal yang tidak mungkin bagi manusia, rasanya mungkin akan sama seperti dinjak 100 ekor gajah di kepala.

snippet.title: Covid: India faces 'disaster' as cases surge and hospitals suffer oxygen shortage | ITV News
snippet.description:
Health officials in India are urging people not to panic as the government insisted it's doing all it can to get oxygen to desperate Covid patients.

Supplies are being diverted from industrial use, as hospitals run out.

Once again the country recorded the highest ever number of new infections for a fifth day in a row.

One doctor warned India will become a "disaster zone" if cases continue to rise.

And a warning - this report from our Correspondent John Ray contains some upsetting images.

snippet.title: India's hospitals swamped as daily COVID cases approach 380,000 | DW News
snippet.description:
India's hospitals turn sick away as daily COVID cases approach 380,000 | DW News
India has set another global record in coronavirus cases, reporting almost 380,000 new infections in the last day. Medical aid from abroad has started arriving in the country, but hospitals are still struggling with shortages of staff and supplies, including oxygen.  India's health care system is so overwhelmed that many patients are being turned away.
A COVID-19 ward in a hospital in Delhi. The hospital, like so many, is full to overflowing. Medical staff are stretched to the limit, some falling ill with the disease themselves. Just one reality in India's coronavirus emergency. 
A woman receives oxygen outside a Sikh temple. She's not alone. There's no room for these people in Delhi's emergency wards. Relatives are left to cope with severely ill patients by themselves. 
A long line outside a Delhi gas supplier. People doing what they can to save their loved ones. Some get the oxygen they need. But there isn't enough to go round. 
The state of Delhi is reporting one death from COVID-19 every four minutes. And as the hospitals can't cope with the growing numbers of patients so the cremation grounds are struggling to cope with the rising numbers of deaths. The funeral pyres are burning day and night.
Delhi is one hotspot of India's COVID-19 emergency. Maharashtra state and the city of Mumbai is another. Here vaccination centers ran out of supplies on Wednesday. India is one of the biggest producers of vaccines. But it doesn't have enough to vaccinate the next 600 million people who will become eligible for the jab. 
Amid the frustration and suffering this: A 105-year-old man and his 95-year-old wife have survived a COVID-19 infection. The family says they want that story to give hope to others. For many fighting the disease, hope and prayers are all they have to help them.


Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/user/deutschewelleenglish?sub_confirmation=1

For more news go to: http://www.dw.com/en/

snippet.title: Tighter COVID-19 measures as number of community cases rise in Singapore
snippet.description:
In view of the growing number of COVID-19 community cases in Singapore, individuals should limit their social interactions to two a day, with no more than the current eight-person limit, Minister Lawrence Wong said. He also outlined measures to reduce the number of people at malls, including re-instating odd-even date entry restrictions at popular malls Lucky Plaza and Peninsula Plaza. Details: https://cna.asia/3xDL67s

snippet.title: 'Kejap katak lompat sini, kejap katak berbunyi sana. Rakyat dah muak!'
snippet.description:
Ketua Polis Negara, Abdul Hamid Bador menggesa Suruhanjaya Pencegahan Rasuah Malaysia (SPRM) menyiasat unsur rasuah berhubung tindakan ahli politik yang melompat parti di negara ini.

Jelasnya, SPRM tidak boleh membiarkan perkara itu berleluasa supaya tidak wujud gambaran negara seolah-olah tidak mempunyai undang-undang.

Jelasnya, selama ini beliau cuba membersihkan pasukan dari budaya rasuah namun pemimpin politik telah membudayakan perkara itu.

Abdul Hamidi turut mempersoalkan sumber diperolehi bagi seseorang ahli politik menggunakan jet peribadi. Dia bagaimanapun tidak menamakan pemimpin politik yang dimaksudkan.

snippet.title: Indonesian navy finds debris from missing submarine | DW News
snippet.description:
Military officials in Indonesia's say they have found items from the submarine that went missing last Wednesday, crushing hopes of any survivors among the 53-member crew. The KRI Nanggala 402 submarine had been classified as missing, but Indonesia's navy says, now it is officially declaring it a sunken vessel.  The sub's oxygen supply is believed to have run out early Saturday. Several countries sent warships and aircraft to help with the search. Rescue crews believe they have located the submarine deep underwater.

snippet.title: Eks KKM Laksda (Purn) Frans Wuwung Ungkap Penyebab KRI Nanggala-402 Tenggelam hingga Terbelah
snippet.description:
KOMPAS.TV - Kepala Staf Angkatan Laut (KSAL) Laksamana TNI Yudo Margono menyatakan kondisi kapal KRI Nanggala-402 terbelah menjadi tiga bagian.

Terdapat bagian yang terlepas dari badan utama kapal.

Yudo menjelaskan terdapat bagian belakang kapal tak berbadan tekan, selanjutnya kemudi horizontal dan vertikal.

Pantauan ini terlihat melalui alat ROV dari Singapura yang mendapat kontak visual dan memperlihatkan adanya serpihan badan kapal KRI Nanggala 402 di kedalaman 838 meter.

Sementara itu, kabar duka disampaikan oleh Panglima TNI, Marsekal Hadi Cahyanto yang menyatakan seluruh awak yang berada dalam KRI Nanggala 402 telah gugur.

Hal ini disampaikan langsung pada saat konferensi pers TNI pada Minggu, 25 April 2021.

Pernyataan ini berdasarkan temuan serpihan dan adanya sinyal Kapal selam KRI Nanggala 402 yang terdeteksi terakhir berada di kedalaman 838 meter.

Sementara diberitakan Schmidt Ocean Institute yang dikutip Kompas.com, di kedalaman lebih dari 800 meter kondisi air tidak seperti yang dirasakan di kolam renang.

Mantan Kepala Kamar Mesin KRI Nanggala-402, Laksamana Muda (Purnawirawan) Frans Wuwung menyebutkan kapal tenggelam dan terbelah akibat sudah melewati batas maksimum kedalaman.

Tekanan hidrostatis air meningkat sebanyak 1 atm setiap kedalaman 10 meter. Artinya, jika tekanan di udara adalah 1 atm, tekanan di kedalaman 850 meter adalah 85 atm dan manusia hanya bisa bertahan pada tekanan sekitar 3-4 atm.

Berenang di laut pada kedalaman 850 adalah hal yang tidak mungkin bagi manusia, rasanya mungkin akan sama seperti dinjak 100 ekor gajah di kepala.

Doa dan rasa hormat menyertai kepergian 53 awak KRI Nanggala-402, setelah kapal selam tersebut dinyatakan tenggelam.

Simak dialog selengkapnya bersama Mantan Kepala Kamar Mesin KRI Nanggala-402, Laksamana Muda (Purnawirawan) Frans Wuwung, Pengamat Militer dari Institut for Security and Strategic Studies (ISESS) Khairul Fahmi dan Jurnalis Harian Kompas, Edna Pattisina.

snippet.title: TWICE гҖҢKura KuraгҖҚ Music Video
snippet.description:
TWICE JAPAN 8th SINGLEгҖҺKura KuraгҖҸ    
2021.05.12 Release!

гҖҗгҒ„гҒ„йҹіжҘҪгҒ§дёҖеәҰгҖҒзҙ жҷҙгӮүгҒ—гҒ„гғ‘гғ•гӮ©гғјгғһгғігӮ№гҒ§дәҢеәҰйӯ…дәҶгҒ•гҒӣгӮӢгҖ‘гҒЁиЁҖгҒҶж„Ҹе‘ігӮ’жҢҒгҒӨгҖҒAsia No.1жңҖеј·гӮ¬гғјгғ«гӮәгӮ°гғ«гғјгғ—TWICEгҖӮ

TWICE JAPAN 8th SINGLEгҖҺKura KuraгҖҸпјҲиӘӯгҒҝпјҡгӮҜгғ©гӮҜгғ©пјүгӮ’5жңҲ12ж—ҘпјҲж°ҙпјүгҒ«гғӘгғӘгғјгӮ№пјҒ

йқҷгҒӢгҒ§е№іе’ҢгҒӘдј‘ж—ҘгҒ®еҚҲеүҚгҒ«йӣҶгҒҫгҒЈгҒҹ9дәәгҒ®еҘігҒ®еӯҗгҒҹгҒЎгҒҢгҖҒзҫҺе‘ігҒ—гҒқгҒҶгҒӘгғ–гғ©гғігғҒгӮ’зӣ®гҒ®еүҚгҒ«гҒ—гҒҰгҖҒгҒқгӮҢгҒһгӮҢгҒ®жҒӢгҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰгҒ®гӮ¬гғјгғ«гӮәгғҲгғјгӮҜгӮ’гҒҜгҒҳгӮҒгӮӢгҖӮ
иҮӘеҲҶгҒ®гғҡгғјгӮ№гҒ§жҲҗй•·гҒҷгӮӢеҪјеҘігҒҹгҒЎгҒҜгҖҢеҗӣгҖҚгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶзү№еҲҘгҒӘеӯҳеңЁгҒ«жҒӢгӮ’гҒ—гҖҒжҸәгӮҢеӢ•гҒҸжҒӢеҝғгӮ’гҖҒеҲҘгӮҢгҒ«жӮІгҒ—гӮҖж„ӣгҖҒзөӮгӮҸгӮҠгҒ®гҒӘгҒ„е№ёгҒӣгҒ«жәўгӮҢгӮӢж„ӣгҒӘгҒ©гҖҒдәәгҒ®ж•°гҒ гҒ‘ж§ҳгҖ…гҒӘеҪўгҒ§еӯҳеңЁгҒҷгӮӢгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’гғЎгғігғҗгғје…Ёе“ЎгҒҢз•°гҒӘгӮӢгӮ·гғҒгғҘгӮЁгғјгӮ·гғ§гғігҒ§иЎЁзҸҫгҖӮ
9дәәгҒ®ж„ҹжғ…гҒҜиҠұгҒҢе’ІгҒҸгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«зӣӣгӮҠдёҠгҒҢгӮҠгҖҒе’ІгҒ„гҒҰгҒҜеЈҠгӮҢгҒҹгӮҠгҒӘгҒ©гҖҒж„ӣгҒ®жҳҺжҡ—гӮ’иЎЁзҸҫгҒ—гҒҹдҪңе“ҒгҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ

гҖҢKura KuraгҖҚгҒҜTWICEгҒ®гғ—гғӯгғҮгғҘгғјгӮөгғјJ.Y. ParkгҒҢдҪңи©һгӮ’жӢ…еҪ“гҖӮ

2021е№ҙгҒҜж–°дҪ“ж„ҹгғ©гӮӨгғ– CONNECTгӮ’зҡ®еҲҮгӮҠгҒ«гҖҒгӮігғӯгғҠзҰҚгҒ§жҙ»еӢ•гҒҢгҒ§гҒҚгҒӘгҒӢгҒЈгҒҹжҷӮй–“гӮ’еӯҰгҒігҒ®жҷӮй–“гҒЁеӨүгҒҲгҒҹеҪјеҘігҒҹгҒЎгҒ®ж–°гҒ—гҒ„иЎЁзҸҫгӮ’еӯҳеҲҶгҒ«йӯ…гҒӣгҖҒеҠұгҒҫгҒ—гҖҒгҒқгҒ—гҒҰеҜ„гӮҠж·»гҒҶгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’иЎЁзҸҫгҒ—гҒҹ2020е№ҙгҒӢгӮүгҖҒгғ•гӮЎгғігғ»е®¶ж—Ҹгғ»еҸӢйҒ”гҒӘгҒ©гҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®дәәгӮ„гғўгғҺгҒ«еҜҫгҒҷгӮӢгҖҢж„ӣгҖҚгӮ’зҷәдҝЎгҒҷгӮӢ2021е№ҙгҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ

йқҷгҒӢгҒ§е№іе’ҢгҒӘдј‘ж—ҘгҒ®еҚҲеүҚгҒ«йӣҶгҒҫгҒЈгҒҹ9дәәгҒ®еҘігҒ®еӯҗгҒҹгҒЎгҒҢгҖҒзҫҺе‘ігҒ—гҒқгҒҶгҒӘгғ–гғ©гғігғҒгӮ’зӣ®гҒ®еүҚгҒ«гҒ—гҒҰгҖҒгҒқгӮҢгҒһгӮҢгҒ®жҒӢгҒ«гҒӨгҒ„гҒҰгҒ®гӮ¬гғјгғ«гӮәгғҲгғјгӮҜгӮ’гҒҜгҒҳгӮҒгӮӢгҖӮ
иҮӘеҲҶгҒ®гғҡгғјгӮ№гҒ§жҲҗй•·гҒҷгӮӢеҪјеҘігҒҹгҒЎгҒҜгҖҢеҗӣгҖҚгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶзү№еҲҘгҒӘеӯҳеңЁгҒ«жҒӢгӮ’гҒ—гҖҒжҸәгӮҢеӢ•гҒҸжҒӢеҝғгӮ’гҖҒеҲҘгӮҢгҒ«жӮІгҒ—гӮҖж„ӣгҖҒзөӮгӮҸгӮҠгҒ®гҒӘгҒ„е№ёгҒӣгҒ«жәўгӮҢгӮӢж„ӣгҒӘгҒ©гҖҒдәәгҒ®ж•°гҒ гҒ‘ж§ҳгҖ…гҒӘеҪўгҒ§еӯҳеңЁгҒҷгӮӢгҒЁгҒ„гҒҶгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’гғЎгғігғҗгғје…Ёе“ЎгҒҢз•°гҒӘгӮӢгӮ·гғҒгғҘгӮЁгғјгӮ·гғ§гғігҒ§иЎЁзҸҫгҖӮ
9дәәгҒ®ж„ҹжғ…гҒҜиҠұгҒҢе’ІгҒҸгӮҲгҒҶгҒ«зӣӣгӮҠдёҠгҒҢгӮҠгҖҒе’ІгҒ„гҒҰгҒҜеЈҠгӮҢгҒҹгӮҠгҒӘгҒ©гҖҒж„ӣгҒ®жҳҺжҡ—гӮ’иЎЁзҸҫгҒ—гҒҹдҪңе“ҒгҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ

гҖҢKura KuraгҖҚгҒҜTWICEгҒ®гғ—гғӯгғҮгғҘгғјгӮөгғјJ.Y. ParkгҒҢдҪңи©һгӮ’жӢ…еҪ“гҖӮ

2021е№ҙгҒҜж–°дҪ“ж„ҹгғ©гӮӨгғ– CONNECTгӮ’зҡ®еҲҮгӮҠгҒ«гҖҒгӮігғӯгғҠзҰҚгҒ§жҙ»еӢ•гҒҢгҒ§гҒҚгҒӘгҒӢгҒЈгҒҹжҷӮй–“гӮ’еӯҰгҒігҒ®жҷӮй–“гҒЁеӨүгҒҲгҒҹеҪјеҘігҒҹгҒЎгҒ®ж–°гҒ—гҒ„иЎЁзҸҫгӮ’еӯҳеҲҶгҒ«йӯ…гҒӣгҖҒеҠұгҒҫгҒ—гҖҒгҒқгҒ—гҒҰеҜ„гӮҠж·»гҒҶгҒ“гҒЁгӮ’иЎЁзҸҫгҒ—гҒҹ2020е№ҙгҒӢгӮүгҖҒгғ•гӮЎгғігғ»е®¶ж—Ҹгғ»еҸӢйҒ”гҒӘгҒ©гҒҷгҒ№гҒҰгҒ®дәәгӮ„гғўгғҺгҒ«еҜҫгҒҷгӮӢгҖҢж„ӣгҖҚгӮ’зҷәдҝЎгҒҷгӮӢ2021е№ҙгҒЁгҒӘгӮӢгҖӮ

snippet.title: еҚғиҗ¬дёҚиҰҒеҺ»пјҒдё–з•ҢеҚҒеӨ§дәәйЎһзҰҒең° | иҖҒй«ҳиҲҮе°ҸиҢү Mr & Mrs Gao
snippet.description:
гҖҗеҠ е…Ҙжңғе“ЎжҢүйҲ•гҖ‘https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCMUnInmOkrWN4gof9KlhNmQ/join
гҖҗеҮәиіЈйқҲйӯӮжҢүйҲ•гҖ‘https://goo.gl/VhzZeS
------------------------------------------------
зӣёй—ңйҸҲжҺҘпјҡ

и¶…еҮәдҪ жғіиұЎзҡ„ж·ұжө·дё–з•Ң
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dNmwPWRdv_0

дәәзӮәд»ҖйәјжҳҜдәәпјҢдәәйЎһжңҖдёҚеҸҜжҖқиӯ°зҡ„е…ӯеҖӢзү№еҫҒ
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EiWuajug1W4

гҖҗйңҮж’јгҖ‘йҖҷжҳҜдёҖйғЁи§Јй–ӢжүҖжңүе®Үе®ҷд№Ӣи¬Һзҡ„еҪұзүҮ
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3QS5hyXpNyw

гҖҗйңҮж’јгҖ‘2045е№ҙпјҢдәәйЎһз©¶з«ҹжҳҜж»…зө•йӮ„жҳҜжҲҗзҘһ
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WY4XLDBDyuk

зӣ®еүҚз¬¬дәҢй•·зҡ„дёҖжңҹпјҢеӨҡйҮҚдәәж јеҲҶиЈӮ
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QAGDGja7kbs

гҖҗйңҮж’јгҖ‘жҷәе•Ҷ200д№ҹз„Ўжі•и§Јзӯ”пјҢе®Үе®ҷжңҖеӨ§зҡ„и¬ҺеңҳпјҢжҷӮй–“
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6SkbNlWMG5w

snippet.title: з‘һеЈ«зҚЁе®¶зӣҙж“ҠеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе®үжЁӮжӯ»е…ЁиЁҳйҢ„гҖҖж„Ҹеҝ—е …еј·еҫһе®№и§Ји„« #зҚЁе®¶ | еҸ°зҒЈж–°иҒһ Taiwan иҳӢжһңж–°иҒһз¶І
snippet.description:
00:00 еӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе®үжЁӮжӯ»е…ЁиЁҳйҢ„
00:37 еӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе®үжЁӮжӯ»еүҚQ&A
05:21 еӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеҸ°зҒЈз¬¬дёҖдё»ж’ӯжңҖеҫҢдёҖж¬ЎиҪүж’ӯ
06:41 еӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе®үжЁӮжӯ»жңҖеҫҢйҒҺзЁӢ
09:54 еӮ…йҒ”д»Ғеӣһе®¶й•·зң йҮ‘еұұ
11:40 иҳӢжһңиЁҳиҖ…жҺЎиЁӘеҫҢиЁҳгҖҢеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеҰӮй·№еұ•зҝ…иҮӘз”ұдәҶгҖҚ

зҒ°жҡ—еӨ©з©әдёӢпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеңЁе®¶дәәзҡ„ж”ҷжү¶дёӢпјҢз·©жӯҘиө°еҮәйЈҜеә—пјҢд»–дјёеҮәзҳҰеҰӮжҹҙжһқзҡ„е·ҰжүӢжҢҮдәҶжҢҮеӨ©з©әпјҢиӘһж°Је …жұәең°з•ҷдёӢдёҖеҸҘгҖҢйҖҷд»—дёҖе®ҡиҰҒжү“гҖҚпјҢжҜ«дёҚеӣһй ӯең°иёҸдёҠз”ҹе‘Ҫзҡ„жңҖеҫҢдёҖж®өи·ҜгҖӮз”ҹе‘Ҫзҡ„зөӮе ҙе“Ёйҹійҹҝиө·пјҢзҹҘеҗҚеүҚй«”иӮІдё»ж’ӯеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒпјҢжҳЁеӨ©еҰӮйЎҳзөҗжқҹиҮӘе·ұзҡ„з”ҹе‘ҪпјҢдә«еЈҪ85жӯІгҖӮ гҖҢж“ҰжқҝпҪһеҫ—еҲҶгҖҚгҖҒгҖҢеЈһеЈһеЈһйҖЈдёүеЈһгҖҚпјҢе’Ңз”ҹе‘Ҫзҡ„е»¶й•·иіҪзөӮз©¶йӮ„жҳҜзөҗжқҹпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғй®®жҙ»дҝҸзҡ®зҡ„иҪүж’ӯзүҮж®өе’Ңж’ӯзҗғйўЁж јпјҢзөӮжҲҗзө•йҹҝпјҢеҚ»е°Үж°ёйҒ з•ҷеңЁзҗғиҝ·е’Ңи§ҖзңҫеҝғдёӯгҖӮ

еӮ…йҒ”д»Ғ5жңҲеә•еүҚеҫҖз‘һеЈ«еҫҢпјҢгҖҠиҳӢжһңгҖӢеңЁд»–зөҗжқҹиҮӘе·ұз”ҹе‘ҪеүҚпјҢе°Қд»–йҖІиЎҢзҚЁе®¶е°ҲиЁӘпјҢжҳЁеӨ©д№ҹе…ЁзЁӢзӣҙж“Ҡд»–еңЁе®¶дәәйҷӘеҗҢдёӢпјҢжҗӯи»ҠеүҚеҫҖз‘һеЈ«гҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚж©ҹж§ӢпјҲDIGNITASпјүиө°еҗ‘з”ҹе‘ҪзөӮй»һзҡ„йҒҺзЁӢгҖӮ иҳҮй»Һдё–йҖҷе№ҫеӨ©еҺҹжң¬йҷҪе…үжҷ®з…§пјҢдҪҶеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒйҒёж“Үйӣўй–Ӣдәәдё–зҡ„йҖҷеӨ©пјҢеӨ©ж°ЈеҚ»жҳҜзҒ°жҝӣжҝӣзҡ„гҖӮд»–еүҚеӨ©жҺҘеҸ—гҖҠиҳӢжһңгҖӢе°ҲиЁӘжҷӮйӮ„иғҪи¬ӣи©ұпјҢжҳЁеҚ»йҖЈдёӢи»ҠйғҪжІ’жңүеҠӣж°ЈпјҢйӣҷи…ізҳҰеҲ°иҰӢйӘЁпјҢж•ҙеҖӢдәәиҷӣејұиҮіжҘөгҖӮ

еҸ°зҒЈжҷӮй–“жҳЁеӨ©дёӢеҚҲ3жҷӮ45еҲҶе·ҰеҸіпјҢеә§и»ҠжҠөйҒ”д»–дёӢжҰ»зҡ„йЈҜеә—еҫҢпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе’Ңе®¶дәәзҙ„еҚҠе°ҸжҷӮеҫҢжүҚдёҠи»ҠпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғиә«и‘—й»‘иүІиҘҝиЈқпјҢдёҠй ӯеҲҘдәҶзҙҖеҝөзҲ¶иҰӘзҡ„жҠ—жҲ°дёғеҚҒе№ҙеӢқеҲ©еҫҪз« пјҢи…із©ҝй»‘иүІзҗғйһӢпјҢеңЁеӨӘеӨӘй„ӯиІҪзҡ„ж”ҷжү¶дёӢиө°еҮәйЈҜеә—еӨ§е»іпјҢе…’еӯҗгҖҒеӘіе©Ұиө°еңЁеүҚйқўпјҢд»–зҡ„зҙ…зІүзҹҘе·ұйҷіе°Ҹе§җеүҮжҠұи‘—е…©жқҹиҠұи·ҹеңЁеҫҢй ӯпјҢд»–е’ҢеҰ»еӯҗи·ҹи‘—з·©жӯҘиө°еҮәпјҢиЁҳиҖ…еҝҚи‘—е“ҖеӮ·еҗ‘д»–йҒ“еҲҘгҖҢеӨ§е“ҘеҶҚиҰӢгҖҚпјҢд»–еҫһе®№еӣһжҮүгҖҢжӢңжӢңгҖҚгҖӮ

дёҠи»ҠеүҚпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғиј•жҸ®е·ҰжүӢдёҰдјёеҮәйЈҹжҢҮжҜ”еӨ©пјҢж„Ҹи¬Ӯи‘—гҖҢж„ҹи¬қдёҠеёқгҖҚпјҢз•ҷдёӢйҒәиЁҖпјҡгҖҢйҖҷд»—дёҖе®ҡиҰҒжү“пјҒгҖҚйҖҷд№ҹжҳҜеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеңЁе…¬й–Ӣе ҙеҗҲжүҖи¬ӣзҡ„жңҖеҫҢдёҖеҸҘи©ұгҖӮд»–зҡ„д№ҫе…’еӯҗжқҺжҒ•ж¬ҠеүҮжІүйҮҚең°иө°еңЁжңҖеҫҢгҖӮ

гҖҠиҳӢжһңгҖӢзӣҙж“ҠпјҢдёӢеҚҲ4жҷӮ45еҲҶпјҢеә§и»ҠжҠөйҒ”е°Ҡеҡҙж©ҹж§ӢпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғзҡ„е…’еӘіе…ҲдёӢи»ҠпјҢжҺҘи‘—жқҺжҒ•ж¬ҠгҖҒеӮ…зҡ„иҖҒе©Ҷй„ӯиІҪгҖҒзҙ…зІүзҹҘе·ұйҷіе°Ҹе§җйҷёзәҢдёӢи»ҠпјҢе…’еӯҗиҰӢеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒдёӢи»Ҡжңүдәӣеӣ°йӣЈпјҢеҸҲеӣһй ӯжү¶еӮ…дёӢи»ҠгҖӮеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеңЁ5еҗҚиҰӘеҸӢйҷӘдјҙдёӢпјҢз·©жӯҘиө°е…ҘгҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚпјҢд»–жҸ®жүӢеҗ‘гҖҠиҳӢжһңгҖӢиЁҳиҖ…йҒ“еҲҘпјҢйҖҷд№ҹжҳҜд»–жңҖеҫҢзҡ„иә«еҪұгҖӮ

еӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе’Ңе®¶еұ¬йҖІе…ҘгҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚзҙ„дёҖе°ҸжҷӮпјҢйғЁеҲҶе®¶еұ¬еӣ еҝғжғ…жІүйҮҚпјҢдёҖеәҰеҲ°йҷўеӯҗжұ еЎҳж—Ғдј‘жҒҜгҖӮгҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚең°иҷ•еҒҸйҒ зҡ„е·ҘжҘӯеҚҖпјҢе°ҚйқўеҸӘжңүиҫІз”°е’Ңи¶ізҗғе ҙпјҢй®®е°‘жңүдәәи»Ҡз¶“йҒҺпјҢгҖҠиҳӢжһңгҖӢиЁҳиҖ…еңЁзҸҫе ҙе®ҲеҖҷзҙ„2е°ҸжҷӮпјҢе№ҫд№ҺжІ’жңүдәәи»Ҡз¶“йҒҺпјҢеҸӘиҒҪеҫ—еҲ°жё…и„ҶжӮ…иҖізҡ„йіҘеҸ«иҒІпјҢеӨ©з©әеүҮжңүиҖҒй·№дҪҺйЈӣзӣӨж—ӢгҖӮ

е®үжЁӮжӯ»жҳҜз”ұйҶ«её«е№«з—…дәәж–Ҫжү“и—Ҙзү©пјҢдҪҶз‘һеЈ«жі•еҫӢдёҰдёҚе…ҒиЁұе®үжЁӮжӯ»пјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеңЁгҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚжҺҘеҸ—зҡ„еүҮжҳҜиј”еҠ©гҖҒйҷӘдјҙжҖ§иҮӘж®әпјҢд»–еҝ…й ҲиҮӘе·ұе…ҲжңҚдёӢжӯўеҗҗеҠ‘пјҢеҚҠе°ҸжҷӮеҫҢеҶҚе–қеҝ«йҖҹиө·ж•Ҳзҡ„зҹӯж•Ҳе…Ёиә«йә»йҶүеҠ‘гҖҢзЎ«еҷҙеҰҘйҲүгҖҚпјҢжҺҘи‘—жңғж…ўж…ўйҷ·е…ҘжҳҸиҝ·пјҢжңҖеҫҢеӣ зӮәе‘јеҗёзі»зөұзҷұзҳ“пјҢеңЁ10еҲҶйҗҳеҲ°1е°ҸжҷӮе…§жӯ»дәЎгҖӮ

ж“ҡдәҶи§ЈпјҢеӮ…е°ұжӯ»еүҚжҘөзӮәиҷӣејұпјҢдҪҶзөҗжқҹз”ҹе‘Ҫзҡ„ж„Ҹеҝ—жҘөзӮәе …е®ҡпјҢд»–жӣҫйҖҸйңІйқһеёёе®іжҖ•иҮӘе·ұи·ҢеҖ’еҸ—еӮ·пјҢеӣ зӮәдёҚжё…йҶ’е°ұз„Ўжі•еҹ·иЎҢпјҢеҠ дёҠе°ҚдҝЎд»°зҡ„е …е®ҡпјҢи®“д»–жұәж„Ҹе®ҢжҲҗзҘһзөҰзҡ„дҪҝе‘ҪпјҢжҲҗзӮәеҸ°зҒЈз¬¬дёҖдҪҚз«ҷеҮәдҫҶе…¬й–ӢеҖЎиӯ°гҖҒдёҰеҲ»е®ЈеёғеңЁгҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚеҹ·иЎҢиј”еҠ©иҮӘж®әзҡ„еҸ°зҒЈжңғе“ЎгҖӮ

е…ЁзЁӢжӯ·жҷӮйҖҫ2е°ҸжҷӮ

жҳЁжҷҡ7жҷӮ37еҲҶе·ҰеҸіпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеҰ»еӯҗиӯүеҜҰеӮ…зҡ„жӯ»иЁҠпјҢгҖҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе·ІжІ’е‘јеҗёеҝғи·іпјҢйӣўй–ӢйҖҷеҖӢдё–з•ҢгҖҚгҖӮд»–еңЁжҳЁжҷҡ6жҷӮ58еҲҶйӣўдё–пјҢе…ЁзЁӢжӯ·жҷӮ2е°ҸжҷӮ13еҲҶгҖӮжүҖжңүйҒҺзЁӢеҹ·иЎҢзөҗжқҹеҫҢпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе°ҮеңЁз‘һеЈ«зҒ«еҢ–пјҢз”ұж–јзҒ«еҢ–д№ҹиҰҒжҺ’йҡҠпјҢжүҖд»ҘжҷӮй–“жңӘе®ҡпјҢдҪҶе®¶еұ¬еёҢжңӣиғҪеё¶д»–зҡ„йӘЁзҒ°еӣһеҸ°зҒЈгҖӮ

еӮ…йҒ”д»Ғеӣ з—…з—ӣзәҸиә«пјҢеёҢжңӣзөҗжқҹиҮӘе·ұз”ҹе‘ҪпјҢдҪҶеӣ еҸ°зҒЈдёҚе…ҒиЁұе®үжЁӮжӯ»пјҢеҺ»е№ҙ11жңҲйҒ иөҙз‘һеЈ«гҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚж©ҹж§ӢпјҢеҸ–еҫ—гҖҢз¶ зҮҲгҖҚиіҮж јпјҢз”ұйҶ«иӯ·дәәе“Ўеҹ·иЎҢйҷӘдјҙжҖ§иҮӘж®әпјҢдҪҶеӣ е…’еӯҗеҚіе°Үзөҗе©ҡиҖҢжҡ«еҒңпјҢзӣҙеҲ°5жңҲеә•жүҚеҶҚеәҰеүҚеҫҖз‘һеЈ«гҖӮ

еӮ…йҒ”д»ҒжҳҜзҹҘеҗҚй«”иӮІдё»ж’ӯпјҢд»–ж’ӯе ұзұғзҗғгҖҒжЈ’зҗғжҷӮзҡ„зү№еҲҘз”ЁиӘһгҖҢи“ӢзҒ«йҚӢгҖҚгҖҒгҖҢжҖҘеҒңжӢүз«ҝгҖҚгҖҒгҖҢдёүдёҚз®Ўең°её¶гҖҚпјҢз”ҡиҮіжҲҗзӮәй«”иӮІз•Ңзҡ„йҖҡз”ЁиӘһпјҢд»–зҪ№жӮЈйҮҚз—…з”ҹе‘Ҫиө°еҲ°зӣЎй ӯд№ӢйҡӣпјҢдҫқз„¶жҢәиә«иҖҢеҮәйј“еҗ№е®үжЁӮжӯ»еҗҲжі•еҢ–пјҢд»–зҡ„дёҖз”ҹпјҢжӯЈеҰӮд»–йј“еӢөжүҖжңүи§ҖзңҫгҖҢе№ҙиј•жҷӮпјҢеҘ®й¬Ҙеҗ‘еүҚпјӣе№ҙиҖҒжҷӮпјҢе–ңжЁӮеҶҚиҰӢгҖҚгҖӮ

11:40 иҳӢжһңиЁҳиҖ…жҺЎиЁӘеҫҢиЁҳгҖҢеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеҰӮй·№еұ•зҝ…иҮӘз”ұдәҶгҖҚ

зҒ°жҡ—еӨ©з©әдёӢпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеңЁе®¶дәәзҡ„ж”ҷжү¶дёӢпјҢз·©жӯҘиө°еҮәйЈҜеә—пјҢд»–дјёеҮәзҳҰеҰӮжҹҙжһқзҡ„е·ҰжүӢжҢҮдәҶжҢҮеӨ©з©әпјҢиӘһж°Је …жұәең°з•ҷдёӢдёҖеҸҘгҖҢйҖҷд»—дёҖе®ҡиҰҒжү“гҖҚпјҢжҜ«дёҚеӣһй ӯең°иёҸдёҠз”ҹе‘Ҫзҡ„жңҖеҫҢдёҖж®өи·ҜгҖӮз”ҹе‘Ҫзҡ„зөӮе ҙе“Ёйҹійҹҝиө·пјҢзҹҘеҗҚеүҚй«”иӮІдё»ж’ӯеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒпјҢжҳЁеӨ©еҰӮйЎҳзөҗжқҹиҮӘе·ұзҡ„з”ҹе‘ҪпјҢдә«еЈҪ85жӯІгҖӮ гҖҢж“ҰжқҝпҪһеҫ—еҲҶгҖҚгҖҒгҖҢеЈһеЈһеЈһйҖЈдёүеЈһгҖҚпјҢе’Ңз”ҹе‘Ҫзҡ„е»¶й•·иіҪзөӮз©¶йӮ„жҳҜзөҗжқҹпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғй®®жҙ»дҝҸзҡ®зҡ„иҪүж’ӯзүҮж®өе’Ңж’ӯзҗғйўЁж јпјҢзөӮжҲҗзө•йҹҝпјҢеҚ»е°Үж°ёйҒ з•ҷеңЁзҗғиҝ·е’Ңи§ҖзңҫеҝғдёӯгҖӮ

еӮ…йҒ”д»Ғ5жңҲеә•еүҚеҫҖз‘һеЈ«еҫҢпјҢгҖҠиҳӢжһңгҖӢеңЁд»–зөҗжқҹиҮӘе·ұз”ҹе‘ҪеүҚпјҢе°Қд»–йҖІиЎҢзҚЁе®¶е°ҲиЁӘпјҢжҳЁеӨ©д№ҹе…ЁзЁӢзӣҙж“Ҡд»–еңЁе®¶дәәйҷӘеҗҢдёӢпјҢжҗӯи»ҠеүҚеҫҖз‘һеЈ«гҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚж©ҹж§ӢпјҲDIGNITASпјүиө°еҗ‘з”ҹе‘ҪзөӮй»һзҡ„йҒҺзЁӢгҖӮ иҳҮй»Һдё–йҖҷе№ҫеӨ©еҺҹжң¬йҷҪе…үжҷ®з…§пјҢдҪҶеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒйҒёж“Үйӣўй–Ӣдәәдё–зҡ„йҖҷеӨ©пјҢеӨ©ж°ЈеҚ»жҳҜзҒ°жҝӣжҝӣзҡ„гҖӮд»–еүҚеӨ©жҺҘеҸ—гҖҠиҳӢжһңгҖӢе°ҲиЁӘжҷӮйӮ„иғҪи¬ӣи©ұпјҢжҳЁеҚ»йҖЈдёӢи»ҠйғҪжІ’жңүеҠӣж°ЈпјҢйӣҷи…ізҳҰеҲ°иҰӢйӘЁпјҢж•ҙеҖӢдәәиҷӣејұиҮіжҘөгҖӮ

еҸ°зҒЈжҷӮй–“жҳЁеӨ©дёӢеҚҲ3жҷӮ45еҲҶе·ҰеҸіпјҢеә§и»ҠжҠөйҒ”д»–дёӢжҰ»зҡ„йЈҜеә—еҫҢпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе’Ңе®¶дәәзҙ„еҚҠе°ҸжҷӮеҫҢжүҚдёҠи»ҠпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғиә«и‘—й»‘иүІиҘҝиЈқпјҢдёҠй ӯеҲҘдәҶзҙҖеҝөзҲ¶иҰӘзҡ„жҠ—жҲ°дёғеҚҒе№ҙеӢқеҲ©еҫҪз« пјҢи…із©ҝй»‘иүІзҗғйһӢпјҢеңЁеӨӘеӨӘй„ӯиІҪзҡ„ж”ҷжү¶дёӢиө°еҮәйЈҜеә—еӨ§е»іпјҢе…’еӯҗгҖҒеӘіе©Ұиө°еңЁеүҚйқўпјҢд»–зҡ„зҙ…зІүзҹҘе·ұйҷіе°Ҹе§җеүҮжҠұи‘—е…©жқҹиҠұи·ҹеңЁеҫҢй ӯпјҢд»–е’ҢеҰ»еӯҗи·ҹи‘—з·©жӯҘиө°еҮәпјҢиЁҳиҖ…еҝҚи‘—е“ҖеӮ·еҗ‘д»–йҒ“еҲҘгҖҢеӨ§е“ҘеҶҚиҰӢгҖҚпјҢд»–еҫһе®№еӣһжҮүгҖҢжӢңжӢңгҖҚгҖӮ

дёҠи»ҠеүҚпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғиј•жҸ®е·ҰжүӢдёҰдјёеҮәйЈҹжҢҮжҜ”еӨ©пјҢж„Ҹи¬Ӯи‘—гҖҢж„ҹи¬қдёҠеёқгҖҚпјҢз•ҷдёӢйҒәиЁҖпјҡгҖҢйҖҷд»—дёҖе®ҡиҰҒжү“пјҒгҖҚйҖҷд№ҹжҳҜеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеңЁе…¬й–Ӣе ҙеҗҲжүҖи¬ӣзҡ„жңҖеҫҢдёҖеҸҘи©ұгҖӮд»–зҡ„д№ҫе…’еӯҗжқҺжҒ•ж¬ҠеүҮжІүйҮҚең°иө°еңЁжңҖеҫҢгҖӮ

гҖҠиҳӢжһңгҖӢзӣҙж“ҠпјҢдёӢеҚҲ4жҷӮ45еҲҶпјҢеә§и»ҠжҠөйҒ”е°Ҡеҡҙж©ҹж§ӢпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғзҡ„е…’еӘіе…ҲдёӢи»ҠпјҢжҺҘи‘—жқҺжҒ•ж¬ҠгҖҒеӮ…зҡ„иҖҒе©Ҷй„ӯиІҪгҖҒзҙ…зІүзҹҘе·ұйҷіе°Ҹе§җйҷёзәҢдёӢи»ҠпјҢе…’еӯҗиҰӢеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒдёӢи»Ҡжңүдәӣеӣ°йӣЈпјҢеҸҲеӣһй ӯжү¶еӮ…дёӢи»ҠгҖӮеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеңЁ5еҗҚиҰӘеҸӢйҷӘдјҙдёӢпјҢз·©жӯҘиө°е…ҘгҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚпјҢд»–жҸ®жүӢеҗ‘гҖҠиҳӢжһңгҖӢиЁҳиҖ…йҒ“еҲҘпјҢйҖҷд№ҹжҳҜд»–жңҖеҫҢзҡ„иә«еҪұгҖӮ

еӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе’Ңе®¶еұ¬йҖІе…ҘгҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚзҙ„дёҖе°ҸжҷӮпјҢйғЁеҲҶе®¶еұ¬еӣ еҝғжғ…жІүйҮҚпјҢдёҖеәҰеҲ°йҷўеӯҗжұ еЎҳж—Ғдј‘жҒҜгҖӮгҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚең°иҷ•еҒҸйҒ зҡ„е·ҘжҘӯеҚҖпјҢе°ҚйқўеҸӘжңүиҫІз”°е’Ңи¶ізҗғе ҙпјҢй®®е°‘жңүдәәи»Ҡз¶“йҒҺпјҢгҖҠиҳӢжһңгҖӢиЁҳиҖ…еңЁзҸҫе ҙе®ҲеҖҷзҙ„2е°ҸжҷӮпјҢе№ҫд№ҺжІ’жңүдәәи»Ҡз¶“йҒҺпјҢеҸӘиҒҪеҫ—еҲ°жё…и„ҶжӮ…иҖізҡ„йіҘеҸ«иҒІпјҢеӨ©з©әеүҮжңүиҖҒй·№дҪҺйЈӣзӣӨж—ӢгҖӮ

е®үжЁӮжӯ»жҳҜз”ұйҶ«её«е№«з—…дәәж–Ҫжү“и—Ҙзү©пјҢдҪҶз‘һеЈ«жі•еҫӢдёҰдёҚе…ҒиЁұе®үжЁӮжӯ»пјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеңЁгҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚжҺҘеҸ—зҡ„еүҮжҳҜиј”еҠ©гҖҒйҷӘдјҙжҖ§иҮӘж®әпјҢд»–еҝ…й ҲиҮӘе·ұе…ҲжңҚдёӢжӯўеҗҗеҠ‘пјҢеҚҠе°ҸжҷӮеҫҢеҶҚе–қеҝ«йҖҹиө·ж•Ҳзҡ„зҹӯж•Ҳе…Ёиә«йә»йҶүеҠ‘гҖҢзЎ«еҷҙеҰҘйҲүгҖҚпјҢжҺҘи‘—жңғж…ўж…ўйҷ·е…ҘжҳҸиҝ·пјҢжңҖеҫҢеӣ зӮәе‘јеҗёзі»зөұзҷұзҳ“пјҢеңЁ10еҲҶйҗҳеҲ°1е°ҸжҷӮе…§жӯ»дәЎгҖӮ

ж“ҡдәҶи§ЈпјҢеӮ…е°ұжӯ»еүҚжҘөзӮәиҷӣејұпјҢдҪҶзөҗжқҹз”ҹе‘Ҫзҡ„ж„Ҹеҝ—жҘөзӮәе …е®ҡпјҢд»–жӣҫйҖҸйңІйқһеёёе®іжҖ•иҮӘе·ұи·ҢеҖ’еҸ—еӮ·пјҢеӣ зӮәдёҚжё…йҶ’е°ұз„Ўжі•еҹ·иЎҢпјҢеҠ дёҠе°ҚдҝЎд»°зҡ„е …е®ҡпјҢи®“д»–жұәж„Ҹе®ҢжҲҗзҘһзөҰзҡ„дҪҝе‘ҪпјҢжҲҗзӮәеҸ°зҒЈз¬¬дёҖдҪҚз«ҷеҮәдҫҶе…¬й–ӢеҖЎиӯ°гҖҒдёҰеҲ»е®ЈеёғеңЁгҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚеҹ·иЎҢиј”еҠ©иҮӘж®әзҡ„еҸ°зҒЈжңғе“ЎгҖӮ

е…ЁзЁӢжӯ·жҷӮйҖҫ2е°ҸжҷӮ

жҳЁжҷҡ7жҷӮ37еҲҶе·ҰеҸіпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»ҒеҰ»еӯҗиӯүеҜҰеӮ…зҡ„жӯ»иЁҠпјҢгҖҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе·ІжІ’е‘јеҗёеҝғи·іпјҢйӣўй–ӢйҖҷеҖӢдё–з•ҢгҖҚгҖӮд»–еңЁжҳЁжҷҡ6жҷӮ58еҲҶйӣўдё–пјҢе…ЁзЁӢжӯ·жҷӮ2е°ҸжҷӮ13еҲҶгҖӮжүҖжңүйҒҺзЁӢеҹ·иЎҢзөҗжқҹеҫҢпјҢеӮ…йҒ”д»Ғе°ҮеңЁз‘һеЈ«зҒ«еҢ–пјҢз”ұж–јзҒ«еҢ–д№ҹиҰҒжҺ’йҡҠпјҢжүҖд»ҘжҷӮй–“жңӘе®ҡпјҢдҪҶе®¶еұ¬еёҢжңӣиғҪеё¶д»–зҡ„йӘЁзҒ°еӣһеҸ°зҒЈгҖӮ

еӮ…йҒ”д»Ғеӣ з—…з—ӣзәҸиә«пјҢеёҢжңӣзөҗжқҹиҮӘе·ұз”ҹе‘ҪпјҢдҪҶеӣ еҸ°зҒЈдёҚе…ҒиЁұе®үжЁӮжӯ»пјҢеҺ»е№ҙ11жңҲйҒ иөҙз‘һеЈ«гҖҢе°ҠеҡҙгҖҚж©ҹж§ӢпјҢеҸ–еҫ—гҖҢз¶ зҮҲгҖҚиіҮж јпјҢз”ұйҶ«иӯ·дәәе“Ўеҹ·иЎҢйҷӘдјҙжҖ§иҮӘж®әпјҢдҪҶеӣ е…’еӯҗеҚіе°Үзөҗе©ҡиҖҢжҡ«еҒңпјҢзӣҙеҲ°5жңҲеә•жүҚеҶҚеәҰеүҚеҫҖз‘һеЈ«гҖӮ

еӮ…йҒ”д»ҒжҳҜзҹҘеҗҚй«”иӮІдё»ж’ӯпјҢд»–ж’ӯе ұзұғзҗғгҖҒжЈ’зҗғжҷӮзҡ„зү№еҲҘз”ЁиӘһгҖҢи“ӢзҒ«йҚӢгҖҚгҖҒгҖҢжҖҘеҒңжӢүз«ҝгҖҚгҖҒгҖҢдёүдёҚз®Ўең°её¶гҖҚпјҢз”ҡиҮіжҲҗзӮәй«”иӮІз•Ңзҡ„йҖҡз”ЁиӘһпјҢд»–зҪ№жӮЈйҮҚз—…з”ҹе‘Ҫиө°еҲ°зӣЎй ӯд№ӢйҡӣпјҢдҫқз„¶жҢәиә«иҖҢеҮәйј“еҗ№е®үжЁӮжӯ»еҗҲжі•еҢ–пјҢд»–зҡ„дёҖз”ҹпјҢжӯЈеҰӮд»–йј“еӢөжүҖжңүи§ҖзңҫгҖҢе№ҙиј•жҷӮпјҢеҘ®й¬Ҙеҗ‘еүҚпјӣе№ҙиҖҒжҷӮпјҢе–ңжЁӮеҶҚиҰӢгҖҚгҖӮ

snippet.title: True number of COVID cases and deaths in India likely far greater than official figures | ABC News
snippet.description:
When the world was first warned about coronavirus it was a crisis like that unfolding in India that scientists were worried about, and it's only intensifying.
Subscribe: http://ab.co/1svxLVE  Read more here: https://ab.co/32UrwWv
For the first time, more than 3,000 people have died in the country in a single day.
There is also a new record number of cases - more than 360,000. That's the seventh day above 300,000.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Testing Netflix's breakable movie props
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Indonesia authorities say found missing submarine, all 53 crew confirmed dead
snippet.description:
Indonesian military chief on Sunday (April 25) confirmed all crew onboard the sunkenВ submarineВ KRI Nanggala-402 have died.

Navy chief of staff  Yudo Margono said the submarineВ was found broken into three parts deep in the Bali sea . 

The submarine had lost contact on Wednesday (April 21) as it prepared to conduct a torpedo drill.

snippet.title: гҖҗINTO1 FIRST STAGE PERFORMANCEгҖ‘NEW Group Song 'INTO1'! We are INTO1! жҲҗеӣўжӣІйҰ–з§ҖпјҒ | еҲӣйҖ иҗҘ CHUANG2021
snippet.description:
CHUANG 2021, produced by Tencent Video, is a variety show of an international boy group formation. It is dedicated to fully showing the stage performance, vigour and persistence of youngsters of new times. Nearly a hundred boys from various countries, agencies and colleges, with the help of outstanding seniors, will be together to make cultural and professional exchanges, improve themselves by rising to the challenge, explore their true self and chase their dreams zealously.

гҖҠеҲӣйҖ иҗҘ2021гҖӢжҳҜз”ұи…ҫи®Ҝи§Ҷйў‘еҮәе“Ғзҡ„еӣҪйҷ…йқ’е№ҙж–ҮеҢ–дәӨжөҒз”·еӣўжҲҗй•ҝз»јиүәпјҢиҮҙеҠӣдәҺе……еҲҶеұ•зҺ°ж–°ж—¶д»ЈеӣҪйҷ…йқ’е№ҙдәәзҡ„йҹід№җиҲһеҸ°иЎЁзҺ°еҠӣгҖҒйқ’жҳҘжҙ»еҠӣе’ҢжӢјжҗҸеҗ‘дёҠеҠӣгҖӮиҠӮзӣ®еҸ¬йӣҶжқҘиҮӘдёҚеҗҢеӣҪе®¶гҖҒдёҚеҗҢз»ҸзәӘе…¬еҸёе’Ңйҷўж Ўзҡ„иҝ‘зҷҫеҗҚеӯҰе‘ҳпјҢеңЁеӨҡдҪҚжҰңж ·еүҚиҫҲзҡ„еј•йўҶгҖҒеҠ©еҠӣгҖҒйҷӘдјҙдёӢдёҖеҗҢиҝӣиЎҢж–ҮеҢ–дёҺдё“дёҡдәӨжөҒгҖҒжү“з ҙйҮҚз»„иҝҺжҺҘжҢ‘жҲҳпјҢдёҖеҗҢжҺўзҙўзңҹжҲ‘зғӯиЎҖиҝҪжўҰгҖӮ

To apply to be on вҖңInstant Influencer with ZHC,вҖқ submit your self-taped YouTube video in our casting portal here.

Uploaders must be over the age of 18 and must live in the United States. Sorry I wasn't able to make it international this time.
Uploaders that demonstrate strong expertise in the art space and a passion for educating and inspiring others will be considered for participation in the show.

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.description:
Vokalis dari grup musik Endang Sukamti, Erik Sukamti di akun Instagram memposting video yang menampilkan sekelompok prajurit TNI menyanyikan lagu ciptaannya yang berjudul Sampai Jumpa. snippet.title: Sethupathi - Full HD Movie | Vijay Sethupathi |  Ramya Nambesan |  Vela Ramamoorthy | Vivek Prasanna
snippet.description:
#tamilmovies#sethupathi#vijaysethupathi

Sub-Inspector Subburaj, who is on night rounds in his C3 Station limits, is lured into a trap and burnt to death by a group of henchmen. Despite being burnt inside his station, he stumbles across a small bridge and dies inside C4 Station's limit. This causes tension to the planner of the attack.

Sethupathi (Vijay Sethupathi) is the police inspector of C4 Station in Madurai who is awaiting his confirmed promotion to ACP. Subburaj's case is given to him. Sethupathi finds out that an influential don and politician, Vaathiyar (Vela Ramamoorthy) of Melur, is behind the murder. Kanagavel is married to Vaathiyar's daughter, but the marriage is unhappy. Therefore, Vaathiyar had decided to kill Kanagavel. Kanagavel was off-duty due to minor injury on the day he was supposed to be murdered, and Subburaj, who was attached as Crime SI in the same police station, was filling in for him. Sethupathi arrests Vaathiyar during a temple festival and forces him to travel to Chennai to apply for bail, earning his enmity.

Later, Sethupathi interrogates two adolescent schoolboys who had sold a stolen chain that was lost in a chain-snatching attempt. When they do not speak up, Sethupathi threatens to shoot them on the count of five, albeit using a non-locked gun. At the fifth count, he accidentally shoots one of the boys in the neck when the other tries to flee, leaving him critically injured. Sethupathi is charged with attempt-to-murder and is suspended. However, he had no intention of shooting either of the boys and realized someone had unlocked his gun, which he had thought was locked. He soon finds out that Kanagavel is responsible for unlocking his gun. Kanagavel covertly bribed constable Muruganandham in C4 Station to unlock the gun and replace the bullets with dummy ones, so that Sethupathi will be defenseless when attacked by Vaathiyar's men. Kanagavel assumed that if an inspector (who is investigating the brutal murder of a sub-inspector) is attacked, the department would retaliate harshly to either kill or to put Vaathiyar in jail for life, so Kanagavel will be not be separated from his daughter.

Sethupathi and Muruganandham appear before an inquiry of three officials to prove the former's innocence. However, one of the members of the inquiry panel is an ally of Vaathiyar and she tries to influence the panel against Sethupathi. Muruganandham's daughter is kidnapped minutes before the inquiry, and he turns against Sethupathi. The same evening, the City Police Commissioner and Regional Civil Commissioner visit Muruganandham's home and discover all the truths. Since these two officers are on the committee, Sethupathi's job is saved. However, Sethupathi's troubles are still not over; Vaathiyar burns Kanagavel alive and start targeting Sethupathi and his family. Sethupathi overcomes all the hurdles put by Vaathiyar and his henchmen. Vaathiyar then decides to silence Sethupathi once and for all by sending his henchmen to kill Sethupathi's wife Malarvizhi (Remya Nambeesan) and two children, but Sethupathi's son, who is aware of the police work, wields Sethupathi's armed revolver to ward them off. Infuriated with the failed attempt, Vaathiyar instructs his men to kill the schoolboy injured by Sethupathi and puts the blame on him. However, Sethupathi, aware of Vaathiyar's plan, guards the hospital where the boy is admitted and saves him from Vaathiyar's henchmen.

With Sethupathi returning to work, Vaathiyar's henchmen accept defeat and warn Vaathiyar to leave Madurai for good, but he does not take heed. The next day, Sethupathi kills Vaathiyar by setting his house on fire and closes his case.

Directed by S. U. Arun Kumar
Produced by Shan Sutharsan
Written by S. U. Arun Kumar
Starring Vijay Sethupathi
Remya Nambeesan
Music by Nivas K. Prasanna
Cinematography Dinesh Krishnan
Edited by A. Sreekar Prasad
Production
company 
Vansan Movies

Later, Sethupathi interrogates two adolescent schoolboys who had sold a stolen chain that was lost in a chain-snatching attempt. At the fifth count, he accidentally shoots one of the boys in the neck when the other tries to flee, leaving him critically injured. Sethupathi is charged with attempt-to-murder and is suspended. However, he had no intention of shooting either of the boys and realized someone had unlocked his gun, which he had thought was locked. He soon finds out that Kanagavel is responsible for unlocking his gun. Kanagavel covertly bribed constable Muruganandham in C4 Station to unlock the gun and replace the bullets with dummy ones, so that Sethupathi will be defenseless when attacked by Vaathiyar's men. Kanagavel assumed that if an inspector (who is investigating the brutal murder of a sub-inspector) is attacked, the department would retaliate harshly to either kill or to put Vaathiyar in jail for life, so Kanagavel will be not be separated from his daughter.

Sethupathi and Muruganandham appear before an inquiry of three officials to prove the former's innocence. However, one of the members of the inquiry panel is an ally of Vaathiyar and she tries to influence the panel against Sethupathi. Muruganandham's daughter is kidnapped minutes before the inquiry, and he turns against Sethupathi. The same evening, the City Police Commissioner and Regional Civil Commissioner visit Muruganandham's home and discover all the truths. Since these two officers are on the committee, Sethupathi's job is saved. However, Sethupathi's troubles are still not over; Vaathiyar burns Kanagavel alive and start targeting Sethupathi and his family. Sethupathi overcomes all the hurdles put by Vaathiyar and his henchmen. Vaathiyar then decides to silence Sethupathi once and for all by sending his henchmen to kill Sethupathi's wife Malarvizhi (Remya Nambeesan) and two children, but Sethupathi's son, who is aware of the police work, wields Sethupathi's armed revolver to ward them off. Infuriated with the failed attempt, Vaathiyar instructs his men to kill the schoolboy injured by Sethupathi and puts the blame on him. However, Sethupathi, aware of Vaathiyar's plan, guards the hospital where the boy is admitted and saves him from Vaathiyar's henchmen.

With Sethupathi returning to work, Vaathiyar's henchmen accept defeat and warn Vaathiyar to leave Madurai for good, but he does not take heed. The next day, Sethupathi kills Vaathiyar by setting his house on fire and closes his case.

snippet.title: Kemudi & Jangkar Ditemukan, Kapal Singapura Temukan Fisik KRI Nanggala-402 | tvOne
snippet.description:
Jakarta, https://www.tvOnenews.com -  Panglima TNI Marsekal Hadi Tjahjanto menyatakan, seluruh awak KRI Nanggala-402 dipastikan telah gugur. Hal ini setelah citra bawah air KRI Rigel dan ROV kapal MV Swift Rescue dari Singapura, yang mencari kapal selam buatan Jerman itu menemukan bukti otentik. Bukti yang ditemukan yakni kemudi vertikal belakang, jangkar, bagian luar badan tekan. Kemudian, kemudi selam timbul, bagian kapal yang lain termasuk baju keselamatan awak kapal MK 11.

Saksikan live streaming tvOne hanya di https://www.tvonenews.com/live

Saksikan live streaming tvOne hanya di https://www.tvonenews.com/live

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal v Everton (0-1) | Premier League
snippet.description:
A second half Bernd Leno own goal condemned us to a home defeat against Everton on Friday night.

Mikel Arteta made six changes from the side that drew with Fulham last time out, the most notable of which saw Eddie Nketiah lead the line with both Alex Lacazette and Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang ruled out.

The England Under-21 striker was a ball of energy up front as he looked to make the most of his chance to impress, although it was the visitors who had the early sights of goal.

The first came when Lucas Digne curled in a cross that Dominic Calvert-Lewin headed wide at the near post, before the formerвҖҷs deflected strike nearly caught out Leno, who reacted well to make a smart stop.

Bukayo Saka then had a snapshot saved after good build-up play, but despite dominating possession we struggled to clear-cut chances.

Leno made a full-length diving save to deny Richarlison on the half-hour mark, while Gylfi Sigurdsson hit the top of the crossbar from a free kick before the interval.

The visitors came close again after the restart when only a brilliant block from Rob Holding at the near post denied Sigurdsson.

We soon thought weвҖҷd been awarded a penalty when Dani Ceballos was tripped in the box by Richarlison, but Nicolas Pepe was adjudged to be millimetres offside and it was chalked off by VAR.

Calum Chambers then had a good opportunity when a free kick from the left bounced invitingly in front of him, but he flashed his shot high and wide.

Dani Ceballos then tested Jordan Pickford with a shot from just outside the area that was palmed around the post, as we looked to press home our advantage.

But with less than 15 minutes remaining, the visitors hit us on the break as Richarlison got past Granit Xhaka in the box and hit a low cross that hit Leno and went through his legs and in.

That proved to be the decisive blow, and settled an underwhelming match.

#arsenal #premierleague 

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

Subscribe to the Official Arsenal YouTube Channel: https://arsn.al/youtube
Follow us on Facebook: https://arsn.al/facebook
Follow us on Twitter: https://arsn.al/twitter
Follow us on Instagram: https://arsn.al/instagram

For more match action, highlights and training videos, make sure you become a digital member and sign up to Arsenal Player. It's FREE and is the Home of the Game: https://arsn.al/arsenalplayer

snippet.title: Body Language Expert Stunned The Queen Did This At The Funeral
snippet.description:
Prince Philip's funeral, although tiny, was nevertheless full of pomp and pageantry befitting the passing of the longest-serving royal consort. There was lovely music performed by a choir (a chamber choir, in this instance); a piper playing The Last Post and chorus; and despite having been warned to stay away due to ever-present COVID danger, crowds still lined the streets, hoping for one last glimpse of their beloved Duke of Edinburgh, a man many considered to be the entire nation's grandpa.

In fact, in one last act of service he performed for his own family, Prince Philip's funeral brought so-called "strayed sheep" Prince Harry back home, if even for a flying visit, and it seems as if he may even have exchanged a few words with his estranged brother. (Grandpa would have been sure to approve.)

The one image that will stay with all of us, however, is that of his widow, the 94-year-old queen, sitting all alone in her pew, head bowed, looking surprisingly small and vulnerable and oh, so heartbreakingly alone despite being the ruler of a nation of over 68 million people, not to mention assorted realms and territories. Body language expert Jason Lee, a former professional poker player who now works as a relationship science and data analyst with Healthy Framework, noticed one moment during the funeral where the queen did something unexpected. He spoke with The List afterwards, giving his interpretation of what he saw and what he thinks it means.

Watch this video for what The Queen did at the funeral that stunned a body language expert! 

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

Read Full Article: https://www.thelist.com/385575/body-language-expert-was-surprised-queen-elizabeth-did-this-during-prince-philips-funeral/

snippet.title: ARSENAL 0-1 EVERTON | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
Everton did the double over Arsenal with a first win at the Emirates thanks to a Richarlison-induced own goal by goalkeeper Bernd Leno. The game was a fairly even contest, with the Gunners being awarded and then denied a penalty, while Gylfi Sigurdsson struck the crossbar and Jordan Pickford was forced into a superb late save. A big three points for the Toffees and the fight for Europe rolls on!

The game was a fairly even contest, with the Gunners being awarded and then denied a penalty, while Gylfi Sigurdsson struck the crossbar and Jordan Pickford was forced into a superb late save. A big three points for the Toffees and the fight for Europe rolls on!

snippet.title: James Corden Is Against the Super League Proposal
snippet.description:
James Corden shares his thoughts on the European Super League proposal that would dismantle the sport. James sees successful adoption of the idea as "the end of the sport we love. It truly is."

snippet.title: Inside Troye Sivan's Victorian-Era Melbourne Home | Open Door | Architectural Digest
snippet.description:
Today Architectural Digest brings you to Australia to visit Troye Sivan at his beautiful Melbourne home. Unpretentious yet expertly decorated, Troye collaborated with designer David Flack of local firm Flack Studio to bring the vision of his sunny, soulful home to life. An erstwhile brick factory and handball court, the property was transformed into a residence in 1970 by architect John Mockridge, preserving the essence of its Victorian-era origins. Today, itвҖҷs an eclectically decorated sanctuary - and a home for TroyeвҖҷs artistic imagination.
